SEARCH
Package clientGui.reservation

Class ReservationController

java.lang.Object
clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator
clientGui.reservation.ReservationController
All Implemented Interfaces:
MessageListener<Object>, BaseController
public class ReservationController extends clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator implements MessageListener<Object>
Controller class for handling the Reservation screen. Allows customers (both regular and subscribers) and employees to create new table reservations. Handles date selection, guest count validation, checking availability, and creating requests.

  • Constructor Details

    • ReservationController

      public ReservationController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the controller class. Sets up the date picker to disable past dates and dates more than a month ahead. Adds listeners for interactive fields to trigger availability checks.

    • initData

      public void initData(ClientUi clientUi, CustomerType isSubscriber, Integer subCode, Object user)
      Unified Initialization Method. Can be called by Employee Dashboard OR Customer Dashboard.
      Parameters:
      clientUi - The main client UI instance.
      isSubscriber - Enum indicating if the user is a subscriber or regular.
      subCode - The subscriber code (if applicable).
      user - The logged-in user object (can be Employee or Customer).

    • setupUIForEmployee

      private void setupUIForEmployee()
      Configures UI elements specifically for Employee mode. Enables manually entering a subscriber ID.

    • setupUIForClient

      private void setupUIForClient()
      Configures UI elements specifically for Client (Customer) mode. Hides employee-specific fields like subscriber ID manual entry. Pre-fills customer details if they are already logged in.

    • loadHours

      private void loadHours()
      Loads available opening hours for the selected date and guest count. Sends a request to the server to check availability.

    • checkSubscriberId

      private void checkSubscriberId()
      Verifies if the entered Subscriber ID exists in the system (Employee mode only).

    • submitReservation

      void submitReservation(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      Handles the submission of a new reservation. Validates input fields, checks capacity, creates the order object, and sends it to the server.
      Parameters:
      event - The ActionEvent from the submit button.

    • onMessageReceive

      public void onMessageReceive(Object msg)
      Description copied from interface: MessageListener
      Called when a message is received from the server.
      Specified by:
      onMessageReceive in interface MessageListener<Object>
      Parameters:
      msg - The message object

    • handleWaitingListResponse

      private void handleWaitingListResponse(Response res)
      Handles responses related to Waiting List actions.

    • handleOrderResponse

      private void handleOrderResponse(Response res)
      Handles responses related to Order actions (Availability check, Create).

    • handleCustomerResponse

      private void handleCustomerResponse(Response res)
      Handles responses related to Customer actions (Verification, Registration).

    • updateTimeButtons

      private void updateTimeButtons(List<TimeSlotStatus> slots)
      Updates the time slot buttons based on availability data from the server.
      Parameters:
      slots - List of time slots with status (available, full/waiting list).

    • selectTime

      private void selectTime(javafx.scene.control.Button btn, String time, boolean isWaitlist)
      Visual logic when a time slot is selected.

    • fillAndLockFields

      private void fillAndLockFields(Customer cus)
      Fills client fields with customer data and makes them uneditable.

    • enableClientFields

      private void enableClientFields()
      Clears client fields and makes them editable (for manual entry).

    • goBack

      void goBack(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      Navigate back to the previous screen based on the current user role.
